title: potentilla grandiflora subvar. stenophylla
intro: Potentilla grandiflora subvar. stenophylla, also known as the dwarf potentilla, is a flowering plant species in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla grandiflora subvar. stenophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
